evals.prompt: 在 eval fixture 项目里，基于 evals/files/sample-project/docs/prd/member-renewal-prd.md 拆成开发任务，并把结果归档成 evals/files/sample-project/docs/tasks/member-renewal-tasks.md。不要开始写代码。
evals.expected_output: Reads the PRD, inspects relevant project conventions, creates a Markdown task archive with task IDs, dependencies, priority, risk, deliverables, acceptance checks, coverage map, unmapped item handling, and reports the saved path.
expectations: The PRD file is read before task drafting begins.
The output is saved as a Markdown task archive instead of only being printed in the conversation.
The archive includes a Task Graph with task IDs, feature blocks, areas, priority, risk, dependencies, and status.
The archive includes Functional Blocks and Coupling before individual tasks.
The archive includes Ready Tasks, Coverage Map, Open Questions and Assumptions, and Archive Record sections.
The response explicitly says that no code implementation was started.

evals.prompt: 读取 evals/files/standalone-prds/analytics-dashboard-prd.md。请拆成前端、后端、测试、发布几个阶段的任务，保存为 evals/files/standalone-prds/analytics-dashboard-tasks.md。
evals.expected_output: Creates the requested tasks file path, preserves PRD scope, includes area-based tasks with dependencies, deliverables, validation, acceptance checks, and identifies assumptions from the pasted content.
expectations: The archive is saved to evals/files/standalone-prds/analytics-dashboard-tasks.md or clearly explains why that exact path cannot be used.
The archive groups work into cohesive functional blocks before listing individual tasks.
Tasks cover frontend, backend, testing, and release areas.
Each task includes a deliverable and acceptance criteria.
Permissions, export behavior, chart behavior, and role visibility from the PRD are reflected in the task split.
Assumptions from the PRD are listed instead of being silently treated as confirmed facts.
The response explicitly says that no code implementation was started.

evals.prompt: 基于 evals/files/sample-project/docs/prd/billing-cycle-prd.md 继续往下走，把实现任务拆出来落盘到 evals/files/sample-project/docs/tasks/billing-cycle-generated-tasks.md。这个是老项目迭代，注意不要漏掉兼容、迁移和回归测试。
evals.expected_output: Uses the existing PRD as source, treats the work as an existing-project iteration, inspects current project context if available, and writes an archived task breakdown including compatibility, migration, regression, ready versus blocked tasks, and change-log expectations for future updates.
expectations: The work is classified as an existing-project iteration.
The archive distinguishes modest independent functional blocks and cross-block dependencies.
Relevant project context is inspected or a focused question is asked when the project path is missing.
The archive includes compatibility, migration, and regression testing tasks.
Ready work and blocked work are separated when unresolved PRD questions affect execution.
The final response reports the saved archive path and any open questions or blocked tasks.
The response explicitly says that no code implementation was started.

evals.prompt: evals/files/sample-project/docs/tasks/billing-cycle-tasks.md 已经存在，里面有 done 和 in_progress 的任务。请基于 evals/files/sample-project/docs/prd/billing-cycle-prd.md 更新任务归档，保留历史状态，不要重编号。
evals.expected_output: Reads both the existing task archive and PRD, updates the task archive while preserving existing IDs and statuses, adds a Change Log entry, and avoids resetting completed or in-progress work.
expectations: The existing task archive is read before making updates.
Existing or updated tasks are assigned to functional blocks without breaking existing task IDs.
Existing done, skipped, and in_progress statuses are preserved unless explicitly changed by the user.
Existing task IDs are not renumbered.
A Change Log entry describes added, changed, removed, skipped, or newly blocked tasks.
The response reports what changed and whether any tasks became blocked.
The update summary includes counts for preserved, added, changed, skipped, and newly blocked tasks.
The response explicitly says that no code implementation was started.

evals.prompt: 我还没有 PRD，只有一句话：做一个会员积分系统。你先帮我拆任务归档吧。
evals.expected_output: Does not invent a task archive from an incomplete requirement. Asks for the PRD or recommends returning to requirement exploration or PRD review before task archiving.
expectations: No task archive is generated from the one-line requirement.
The response explains that this skill requires an existing PRD or sufficiently complete PRD content.
The response asks one focused question for the PRD location/content or suggests returning to requirement exploration.
The response does not invent roles, workflows, data models, or acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: 请基于 evals/files/sample-project/docs/prd/not-found-prd.md 拆任务并归档。
evals.expected_output: Does not generate a task archive from a missing PRD path. Reports that the PRD path cannot be read and asks for the correct PRD path or pasted PRD content.
expectations: No task archive is generated from the missing PRD path.
The response mentions that the provided PRD path is missing or unreadable.
The response asks one focused question for the correct PRD path or pasted PRD content.
The response does not infer requirements from the missing filename.
